questions.question: Define the term 4:1 and explain its significance in digital design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A brief explanation of 4:1 including its advantages and applications in digital design

questions.question: Compare and contrast 4:1 and 8:1 counters in terms of their architecture, speed, and power consumption. (10 marks)
questions.hint: A detailed analysis of the differences between 4:1 and 8:1 counters including their design considerations and applications

questions.question: Design a 4:1 counter for a digital system. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed design of a 4:1 counter including its truth table, flip-flop implementation, and control logic
